Gamma vs Tome vs Beautiful.ai vs Decktopus: AI Presentation Tools Tested

Quick Verdict

Gamma most visually impressive. Beautiful.ai enforces professional design. Tome best narrative storytelling. Decktopus most affordable.

FeatureGammaTomeBeautiful.aiDecktopus
AI GenerationExcellentVery GoodGoodVery Good
Design QualityVery GoodVery GoodExcellentGood
Price (Pro)$10/mo$16/mo$12/mo$9.99/mo

Which Tool for Which Audience

Startup pitches: Gamma - visually stunning, real-time collaboration. Corporate: Beautiful.ai - Smart Templates enforce consistency. Educational: Tome - best narrative flow with embedded media. Budget: Decktopus - solid AI at lowest price.

FAQ

Gamma - under 30 seconds from prompt to full presentation.

All four support PPTX export.

Beautiful.ai for professional consistency. Gamma for creativity.
